conventions_kody_engine_450094471921.content: Project memory is stored at `.kody/memory.md` and injected into taskify via the `{{PROJECT_CONTEXT}}` block in `prompts/taskify-ticket.md`.

conventions_kody_engine_450095999021.content: The file tree is generated using `git ls-files` (not `find` or tree walkers) and injected alongside project memory into the PROJECT_CONTEXT block.

facts_kody_pipeline_450097388402.content: Verification-only tasks use task.md to document the expected behavior and confirm it already works, requiring no code changes.
